chats_owner.name: chats_owner
chats_owner.withCheck: owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) AND (project_id IS NULL OR project_id IN (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)))

compactions_owner.name: compactions_owner
compactions_owner.using:
chat_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM chats
        WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

messages_owner.name: messages_owner
messages_owner.using:
chat_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM chats
        WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

messages_public_read.name: messages_public_read
messages_public_read.using: current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) = '' AND chat_id IN (SELECT id FROM chats WHERE visibility = 'public')

run_events_owner_select.name: run_events_owner_select
run_events_owner_select.using:
run_id IN (
        SELECT runs.id FROM runs
        INNER JOIN chats ON chats.id = runs.chat_id
        WHERE chats.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

run_events_owner_insert.name: run_events_owner_insert
run_events_owner_insert.withCheck:
run_id IN (
        SELECT runs.id FROM runs
        INNER JOIN chats ON chats.id = runs.chat_id
        WHERE chats.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

runs_owner.name: runs_owner
runs_owner.using:
chat_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM chats
        WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

memberships_insert.name: memberships_insert
memberships_insert.withCheck:
(
        user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        AND role = 'owner'
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
          WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
            AND u.parent_id IS NULL
            AND u.created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        )
      ) OR (
        llame_role_on_unit_path(memberships.org_unit_id, ARRAY['owner']::org_role[])
      ) OR (
        memberships.role <> 'owner'
        AND llame_role_on_unit_path(memberships.org_unit_id, ARRAY['owner','admin']::org_role[])
      )

memberships_update.name: memberships_update

memberships_delete.name: memberships_delete
memberships_delete.using:
user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        OR (memberships.role <> 'owner' AND llame_role_on_unit_path(memberships.org_unit_id, ARRAY['owner','admin']::org_role[]))
        OR llame_role_on_unit_path(memberships.org_unit_id, ARRAY['owner']::org_role[])

org_units_select.name: org_units_select
org_units_select.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin','maintainer','member','viewer','guest','service_account')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  ) OR created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)

org_units_insert.name: org_units_insert
org_units_insert.withCheck:
created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) AND (parent_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  ))

org_units_update.name: org_units_update
org_units_update.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )
org_units_update.withCheck:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )

org_units_delete.name: org_units_delete
org_units_delete.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )

pins_owner_insert.name: pins_owner_insert
pins_owner_insert.withCheck:
user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) AND (
        (item_type = 'chat' AND item_id IN (SELECT id FROM chats WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)))
        OR (item_type = 'project' AND item_id IN (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)))
      )
